Ntc And Motion For Protective Order
Off Calendar Sep-26-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:


Appearance:
Lawrence Janssen, in pro per, Plaintiff/Moving Party
William S. Weisberg, Esq., for EGS Associates, Inc. and John Sawyer, Defendants/Opposing Party.

Ruling:
Tentative Ruling adopted with modification: Plaintiff Lawrence Janssen's Motion For Protective Order Limiting Scope Of Discovery is denied. There are no good grounds asserted by plaintiff for a protective order. The interrogatories do not invade any right to privacy or work product privilege. As each defendant may propound 35 interrogatories without a declaration of good cause, there has been no violation of the 35 interrogatory limit. Plaintiff is admonished that his motions must be based upon substantial legal grounds. Future motions made without substantial justification may be subject to the imposition of sanctions.

Modification: Responses due by 10/18/07. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
